posts.author: sbarber (Shane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I need to be able to be able to export only certain subitems in the same way we can export Items. Currently you can select an Item and export the item WITH subitems, but I need to be able to ONLY export the subitems of a specific parent item.

What are you trying to achieve

This would allow me to export the subitem information we will need to share without including unnecessary data, such as Status columns, People columns, internal timelines, etc. that are present in the parent Item.
